qa_pairs.question: Who is required to have an updated CCV for a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application?
qa_pairs.answer: An updated CCV is required for the Academic Principal Investigator (PI) and all co-PIs of a RAC application.

qa_pairs.question: Why might most Academic PIs already have an updated CCV when applying for a RAC in the fall?
qa_pairs.answer: Most Academic PIs will have an updated CCV when submitting a RAC application in the fall because faculty are required to update their CCV to renew Alliance accounts in the spring.

qa_pairs.question: Is it mandatory for an Academic PI to submit a new CCV for a RAC application if they've already updated it for a spring account renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if new information was added to the CCV since the spring, submitting a new CCV for a RAC application is at the discretion of the PI, implying it's not strictly mandatory if an updated one already exists.

qa_pairs.question: When does the Alliance generally require faculty to update their CCV for account renewals?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty are generally required to update their CCV to renew Alliance accounts in the spring.
